sensor_modes.name: DCG (Dual Conversion Gain) - 24mm
sensor_modes.description: Enables Dual Conversion Gain on the 24mm main lens for improved dynamic range in low light.

sensor_modes.name: DCG (Dual Conversion Gain) - 78mm
sensor_modes.description: Enables Dual Conversion Gain on the 78mm telephoto lens for improved dynamic range in low light.

sensor_modes.name: 120FPS Mode - 24mm & 78mm
sensor_modes.description: Enables 120 frames per second recording on both the 24mm main lens and 78mm telephoto lens.
